flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at East Georgia State College fell 77% between 2022 and 2024 (14.3% → 3.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 33% at East Georgia State College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.4k vs 2.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at East Georgia State College fell 24% between 2006 and 2009 (9.3% → 7.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at East Georgia State College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.4k).
